news.t: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges

holdings.infoBox: LVDS is an equity ETF with a total of 137 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 3.77%, Alphabet at 3.51%, Amazon.com at 2.21%, Exxon Mobil at 2.16%, and Bank of America at 2.03%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Fundamental Data Science Large Value ETF (LVDS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through investments in large-cap US companies. Stock selection is based on a fundamental data science-enabled approach. LVDS was launched on Jul 8, 2025 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges
data.text: NEW YORK, March 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the upcoming exchange listing transfer of 14 ETFs from their current exchanges including the NASDAQ Stock Market L...
